# The AI Business Ledger

> First-party profit and loss data from a portfolio of AI-operated businesses: an autonomous freelance services desk, ad-monetized AI content networks, algorithmic trading research, and killed ventures with post-mortems. Published monthly with a stated methodology and rounding policy. Free to cite with attribution to "The AI Business Ledger, aibusinessledger.com".

Key facts (July 2026 founding edition):
- Freelance services desk running on in-house automation systems: $2,700+ collected plus funded escrow in first three weeks, 5 clients, ~$300 acquisition cost, no ads.
- Compute per ~$120 research job: under $15 in model tokens (estimate, marked).
- AI content network: 80,000+ subscribers, six-figure annual run rate; survivor of multiple attempts.
- Two ventures killed in July 2026 (copyright exposure; underwater niche monetization), post-mortems published.

## Core pages
- [The AI Business P&L Report, July 2026](https://aibusinessledger.com/report/2026-ai-business-pnl/): venture-by-venture revenue, costs, margins, and post-mortems
- [Methodology](https://aibusinessledger.com/methodology/): sources, rounding policy, redaction policy
- [Data downloads](https://aibusinessledger.com/data/): the dataset as CSV and JSON
- [Answers](https://aibusinessledger.com/answers/): common questions answered only with first-party numbers

## Publisher
Published by the operators of [VerifiedDesk](https://verifieddesk.com/), an independent B2B operations desk selling verified lead research, cited market research, and automation builds on systems it built for itself. The data is free; the publisher sells automation builds and venture feasibility studies.
